commit_scope: Enrich public field-story trace slices with influence spectrum, volume, source mix, public-safe backtrace samples, and duration backfill from existing event traces.

local_validation.summary: Field-story trace slices now publish a richer event shape: volume, influence_spectrum, source_mix, and backtrace_samples. Missing durations are backfilled from existing event traces by YouTube video id, then author/work, then work title before remaining unknown. Mose's public author slice now reports 623 duration-backed events and 77.61 known hours from authenticated YouTube Music MyActivity traces, while retaining the original dated YouTube Takeout event source and backtrace source line.

deploy_validation.details: Public deploy verification will run after merge if this branch is published.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Agents and public readers can see more than event counts on field-story trace slices: rhythm, volume, evidence mix, and compact backtraces to trace slices are present without exposing raw private source bodies.
test_flows: Mose author trace includes volume with known_duration_seconds and backfilled_duration_event_count
Mose author trace includes influence_spectrum with devotional-body / vitality
Backtrace samples include event id, source line, duration backfill evidence, and month/author/work trace links

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete; rebase, local PR guard, commit, push, and PR checks remain pending.
